species: N2O-reducing enrichment culture (activated-sludge-derived mixed community; nosZ clade I dominated)

growth_records.strain: Chemostat enrichment (inocula: Harnaschpolder and Dokhaven WWTP activated sludge)
growth_records.medium: Mineral medium with acetate + N2O (Period II, acetate-limited)
growth_records.cite: Conthe et al. Life on N2O: deciphering the ecophysiology of N2O respiring bacterial communities in a continuous culture. The ISME Journal (2018). DOI:10.1038/s41396-018-0063-7. [PMC5864245]
growth_records.snippet: Period II | Acetate | D=0.089 | CH3COO- -7.74 | N2O -23.97 | N2 24.38 | NH4+ -1.15 | biomass 4.11 | CO2 9.94 (Table 2). YXAc 0.27, YXN2O 0.17 (Table 3).
growth_records.notes: mu=D=0.089; td=ln2/0.089=7.79 h. biomass(Cmol)=4.11/0.089=0.04618 Cmol; gDW=*24.6=1.136 g. Specific rate=Table2 mmol/h / 1.136 gDW. Acetate-limited. Mixed community. C-bal 94%, e- bal 106%.
